_comment: Central model configuration for the SDLC pipeline. Inline skills (Ph1–Ph6, Ph8–Ph10) use the full model IDs specified here — pinned to an exact version. Ph7 subagents are invoked via the Agent tool which only accepts sonnet|opus|haiku aliases; Anthropic controls alias resolution for those and they cannot be pinned. Update full model IDs here when intentionally upgrading. 'default' is used as fallback for any phase not explicitly listed.

pricing_per_million_tokens._comment: USD per 1M tokens. Update when Anthropic changes pricing.

_model_selection_note: Planning phases (requirements/architecture/design-review/impl-planning) default to sonnet. jira-classification overrides these to opus when ticket type is Large Feature.

large_feature_overrides._comment: Applied by jira-classification when ticket type is Large Feature. Planning phases get opus for higher quality architectural reasoning. Ph7 subagents use the 'opus' alias — Anthropic resolves the exact version.
